title.ko: 회전운동의 전달을 위한 커플링(coupling)(회전을 운반하기 위한 전동 장치 F16H, 예. 액체 전동 장치 F16H 39/00-F16H 47/00); 클러치(clutch)(다이나모 일렉트릭(dynamo-electric) 클러치 H02K 49/00; 정전기 인력을 사용하는 클러치 H02N 13/00); 브레이크(brake)(차량용 전동식 제동 시스템 일반 B60L 7/00; 다이나모 일렉트릭(dynamo-electric) 브레이크 H02K 49/00)
title.en: COUPLINGS FOR TRANSMITTING ROTATION (gearing for conveying rotation F16H, e.g. fluid gearing F16H0039000000-F16H0047000000); CLUTCHES (dynamo-electric clutches H02K0049000000;clutches using electrostatic attraction H02N0013000000); BRAKES (electrodynamic brake systems for vehicles in general B60L0007000000;dynamo-electric brakes H02K0049000000)

definition.ko: 커플링 일반 F16D1/00 휨(YIELDING); 충격; 미끄럼 F16D3/00; 5/00; 7/00 안전부재를 갖는 것 F16D9/00 동력전달 수단으로서 유체를 사용하는 것 F16D31/00, F16D33/00, F16D39/00 클러치 기계적 작용에 의한 것 부재가 직접 접촉하고 있는 것 F16D11/00, F16D13/00, F16D17/00 분리된 부재를 갖는 것 F16D15/00 그 밖의 것; 조합시킨 것 F16D19/00; 21/00 세부사항 F16D23/00 비기계적 작용에 의한 것 유체에 의한 것 F16D25/00, F16D29/00 자기적 작용에 의한 것 F16D27/00, F16D29/00 전기적 작용에 의한것 F16D28/00, F16D29/00 동력전달수단으로서 유체를 사용하는 것 F16D31/00 ～ 37/00 프리휘일(FREE WHEEL), 자동식 F16D41/00, F16D43/00, F16D45/00 조합시킨 것 F16D45/00, F16D47/00 클러치의 외부제어에 관한 것 F16D48/00 프리휘일(FREE WHEEL) 또는 프리휘일 클러치 F16D41/00, F16D45/00 브레이크 기능을 특징으로 하는 것 F16D49/00 ～ 55/00 액체 또는 기체의 저항을 사용하는 것 F16D57/00 자동식 F16D59/00 흡수에너지를 이용하는 수단을 갖는 것 F16D61/00 그 밖의 것 F16D63/00 세부 F16D65/00, F16D69/00, F16D71/00 작동상태를 감시하는 것 F16D66/00 서로 다른 작용을 조합시킨 것 F16D47/00, F16D67/00

title.ko: 2개의 동심축 또는 다른 가동기계요소를 고정적으로 결합하는 커플링(크랭크를 그 축에 부착하기 위한 것 F16C 3/10)
title.en: Couplings

title.ko: 2개의 동심축 또는 다른 가동기계요소를 고정적으로 결합하는 커플링(크랭크를 그 축에 부착하기 위한 것 F16C 3/10)
title.en: Couplings for rigidly connecting two coaxial shafts or other movable machine elements (for attachment of cranks to their shafts F16C0003100000)
for connecting two abutting shafts or the like
non-disconnectable, e.g. involving gluing, welding or the like
by clamping together two faces perpendicular to the axis of rotation, e.g. with bolted flanges
with clamping hub; with hub and longitudinal key
with radial clamping due to axial loading of at least one pair of conical surfaces

title.ko: 축상 또는 축끝에 부재를 부착하기 위한 것(축상에 선박의 프로펠러를 부착하기 위한 것 B63H 23/34)
title.en: for attachment of a member on a shaft or on a shaft-end (attachment of marine propellers on shafts B63H0023340000)

title.ko: 비 차단식의 것
title.en: non-disconnectable
involving gluing, welding or the like

title.ko: 소성변형을 포함하는 것(소성용접 1/068)
title.en: involving plastic deformation (plastic welding F16D0001068000)
by clamping together two faces perpendicular to the axis of rotation, e.g. with bolted flanges

title.ko: 결합허브(clamping hub)를 갖는 것; 허브와 길이방향의 키를 갖는 것
title.en: with clamping hub; with hub and longitudinal key

title.ko: 적어도 한 쌍의 원뿔면의 축하중에 의한 반경방향의 클램핑을 갖는 것
title.en: with radial clamping due to axial loading of at least one pair of conical surfaces
and comprising a chamber including a tapered piston moved axially by fluid pressure to effect clamping
the pair of conical mating surfaces being provided on the coupled hub and shaft

title.ko: 적어도 한개의 원추면을 형성하고 하나 또는 복수의 탄성 혹은 분할된 원추 링을 확장 또는 수축시키는 것으로 클램핑 하는것(1/091이 우선)
title.en: using one or more elastic or segmented conical rings forming at least one of the conical surfaces, the rings being expanded or contracted to effect clamping (F16D0001091000 takes precedence)
using one or more pairs of elastic or segmented rings with mutually mating conical surfaces, one of the mating rings being contracted and the other being expanded
with clamping effected by ring contraction only
the ring or rings being located between the shaft and the hub
with clamping effected by ring expansion only, e.g. with an expanded ring located between hub and shaft

title.ko: 서로 축 방향으로 움직이게 하는 것만으로 2개의 부분이 신속하게 결합되는 커플링
title.en: Quick-acting couplings in which the parts are connected by simply bringing them together axially
having retaining means rotating with the coupling and acting only by friction

title.ko: 커플링과 함께 회전하고 상호 결합하는 부분에 의해 작동하는 유지수단을 가지는 것. 즉, 포지티브 커플링(positive coupling)
title.en: having retaining means rotating with the coupling and acting by interengaging parts, i.e. positive coupling
the interengaging parts comprising torque-transmitting surfaces, e.g. bayonet joints

title.ko: 상호 결합하는 부분은 커플링부의 표면에 연속적이거나 중단된 원주상의 홈을 가지는 것(축상에 허브를 지지하기 위한 써클립(circlips) F16B 21/18)
title.en: the interengaging parts including a continuous or interrupted circumferential groove in the surface of one of the coupling parts (circlips for retaining hubs on shafts F16B0021180000)

title.ko: 축둘레에 그 부분의 조정이 가능한 것(운전중에 있어서의 조정이 가능한 것 3/10)
title.en: allowing adjustment of the parts about the axis (during motion F16D0003100000)

title.ko: 휨 커플링, 즉 구동중에 결합된 부품사이에서의 운동을 가능하게 하는 수단을 갖는 것(단순히 축 방향의 변위만으로 결합을 분리할 수 있는 커플링 F16D 1/10; 미끄름 커플링 F16D 7/00; 유체 커플링 F16C 31/00- F16D 39/00)
title.en: Yielding couplings, i.e. with means permitting movement between the connected parts during the drive (couplings disconnectable simply by axial movement F16D0001100000;slip couplings F16D0007000000;fluid couplings F16D0031000000-F16D0039000000)

title.ko: 특수한 기능에 적합한 것
title.en: adapted to specific functions
specially adapted to allow radial displacement, e.g. Oldham couplings
specially adapted to allow axial displacement
Couplings for intersecting shafts, provided with intermediate bars bent in an angle corresponding with the angle of intersection
Couplings with means for varying the angular relationship of two coaxial shafts during motion

title.ko: 특히 충격이나 진동을 흡수하는 에너지를 축적하도록 되어 있는 것(유체요소를 이용하는 것 3/80)
title.en: specially adapted for accumulation of energy to absorb shocks or vibration (by making use of fluid elements F16D0003800000)
combined with a friction coupling for damping vibration or absorbing shock

title.ko: 피봇(pivot), 슬라이드(slide) 또는 롤(roll)에 의한 결합부분에서 구부러짐(flexibility)이 생기는 자재이음
title.en: Universal joints in which flexibility is produced by means of pivots or sliding or rolling connecting parts
the coupling parts having slidably-interengaging teeth
of resilient material or structure

title.ko: 한쪽의 이음부재가 다른쪽의 이음부재의 슬리브 속에 들어가서 미끄럼 또는 굴림 부재에 의해서 거기에 결합되는 것(3/18, 3/24가 우선)
title.en: one coupling part entering a sleeve of the other coupling part and connected thereto by sliding or rolling members (F16D0003180000, F16D0003240000 take precedence)
one coupling part having radially projecting pins, e.g. tripod joints
the pins extending radially outwardly from the coupling part
the pins extending radially inwardly from the coupling part

title.ko: 회전부재가 볼, 롤러 등과 같은 것으로, 양 커플링 부재사이에서의 홈이나 소켓내에서 안내되는 것
title.en: the rolling members being balls, rollers, or the like, guided in grooves or sockets in both coupling parts
the rolling members being located in sockets in one of the coupling parts

title.ko: 양쪽 연결부에서 홈(groove)으로 가이드되는 롤링 부재
title.en: the rolling members being guided in grooves in both coupling parts
where the track is made up of two curves with a point of inflexion in between, i.e. S-track joints
where the grooves are composed of radii and adjoining straight lines, i.e. undercut free [UF] type joints
the groove centre-lines of each coupling part lying on a sphere
where the groove centres are offset from the joint centre
the groove centre-lines of each coupling part lying on a cylinder co-axial with the respective coupling part
the joints being telescopic

title.ko: 각 커플링부품의 축과 평행한 수면상에 위치한 홈중심선을 갖는 프리즘(prismatic) 커플링 부재 (3/224, 3/226 우선)
title.en: Prismatic coupling parts having each groove centre-line lying on planes parallel to the axis of the respective coupling part (F16D0003224000, F16D0003226000 take precedence)
comprising balls, rollers, or the like, between overlapping driving faces, e.g. cogs, on both coupling parts

title.ko: 각 커플링 부재가 피봇 또는 미끄럼가능하게 연결된 동등한 중간부재를 갖는 후크 이음 또는 기타 이음(3/18, 3/20이 우선)
title.en: Hooke's joints or other joints with an equivalent intermediate member to which each coupling part is pivotally or slideably connected (F16D0003180000, F16D0003200000 take precedence)
with two or more intermediate members pivotally or slidably connected together, e.g. tongue-and-slipper type joints
in which the interconnecting pivots include elastic members
in which the coupling is specially adapted to constant velocity-ratio
by the provision of two intermediate members each having two relatively- perpendicular trunnions or bearings
with ball or roller bearings
parts being connected by ridges, pins, balls, or the like guided in grooves or between cogs
in which each pivot between the coupling parts and the intermediate member comprises a single ball

title.ko: 서로 수직인 2개의 축에 트러니언 또는 베어링을 갖는 중간요소를 1개만 갖는 것(3/36이 우선)
title.en: with a single intermediate member with trunnions or bearings arranged on two axes perpendicular to one another (F16D0003360000 takes precedence)
with intermediate member provided with two pairs of outwardly-directed trunnions on intersecting axes
with ball or roller bearings
with ring-shaped intermediate member provided with bearings or inwardly-directed trunnions
with ball or roller bearings
the intermediate member being connected to the coupling parts by ridges, pins, balls, or the like guided in grooves or between cogs
each coupling part embracing grooves or ridges on the intermediate member
one coupling part having pins arranged parallel to the axis and entering holes in the other coupling part

title.ko: 1개 또는 그 이상의 중간 요소에 의하여 연결되어 있는 커플링 부재를 갖는 것(3/16이 우선)
title.en: with the coupling parts connected by one or more intermediate members (F16D0003160000 takes precedence)
comprising a continuous strip, spring, or the like engaging the coupling parts at a number of places
Couplings comprising a chain or strip surrounding two wheels arranged side by side and provided with teeth or the equivalent
comprising elastic metal lamellae, elastic rods, or the like, e.g. arranged radially or parallel to the axis, the members being shear-loaded collectively by the total load
the intermediate members being made of rubber or like material

title.ko: 압축 또는 인장의 작용을 하는 링크(link)가 2부재에 붙어 있는 것 (3/64이 우선)
title.en: comprising pushing or pulling links attached to both parts (F16D0003640000 takes precedence)
the links or their attachments being elastic
comprising elastic elements arranged between substantially-radial walls of both coupling parts
the elements being metallic, e.g. in the form of coils
the elements being made of rubber or similar material
comprising elastic elements arranged in holes in one coupling part and surrounding pins on the other coupling part

title.ko: 커플링 부재에 대하여 축 방향으로 공간이 존재하고 부착구를 갖는 것(3/56이 우선)
title.en: with axially-spaced attachments to the coupling parts (F16D0003560000 takes precedence)
the intermediate member or members being made of rubber or other flexible material
shaped as an elastic ring centered on the axis, surrounding a portion of one coupling part and surrounded by a sleeve of the other coupling part
the ring being metallic

shaped as an elastic disc or flat ring, arranged perpendicular to the axis of the coupling parts, different sets of spots of the disc or ring being attached to each coupling part, e.g. Hardy couplings
the disc or ring being metallic

title.ko: 유체가 이용되는 것(연속슬립을 허용하는 유체 미끄름 커플링 31/00 ～ 35/00)
title.en: in which a fluid is used (fluid couplings allowing continuous slip F16D0031000000-F16D0035000000)
with a coupling element in the form of a pneumatic tube
Shrouds, e.g. casings, covers; Sealing means specially adapted therefor

title.ko: 충격 커플링, 즉 피동부분을 교대로 가속하거나 감속하는 커플링(유체 커플링 F16C 31/00-F16D 39/00)
title.en: Impulse couplings, i.e. couplings that alternately accelerate and decelerate the driven member (fluid couplings F16D0031000000-F16D0039000000)

title.ko: 미끄름 커플링, 예. 과부하일때에 충격을 흡수하기 위하여 미끄러지는 것(휨 축커플링으로 결합되는 것 3/14, 유체 미끄럼 커플링 31/00 ～ 35/00)
title.en: Slip couplings, e.g. slipping on overload, for absorbing shock (combined with yielding shaft couplings F16D0003140000;fluid slip couplings F16D0031000000-F16D0035000000)
of the friction type
of the ratchet type
with intermediate balls or rollers
moving axially between engagement and disengagement
moving radially between engagement and disengagement

title.ko: 결합을 분리하기 위한 커플링 안전장치
title.en: Couplings with safety member for disconnecting
by thermal means, e.g. melting member
by tensile breaking

title.ko: 전단력에 의한 파괴
title.en: by breaking due to shear stress

title.ko: 회전축의 한 부분 이상을 둘러싸고 있는 것에 의한 것, 예. 축상의 전단목(shear necks)(9/10 우선)
title.en: over a single area encircling the axis of rotation, e.g. shear necks on shafts (F16D0009100000 takes precedence)
having a part movable after disconnection so as to provide reconnection, e.g. advanceable shear pins

title.ko: 부부재가 서로 계합하는 부분을 가지는 클러치(동기장치 23/02; 자동 클러치 F16D 43/00- F16D 45/00; 외부 제어 F16D 48/00)
title.en: Clutches with mechanically-actuated clutching members; Synchronisation arrangements for clutches

title.ko: 부부재가 서로 계합하는 부분을 가지는 클러치(동기장치 23/02; 자동 클러치 F16D 43/00- F16D 45/00; 외부 제어 F16D 48/00)
title.en: Clutches in which the members have interengaging parts (arrangements for synchronisation F16D0023020000;automatic clutches F16D0043000000-F16D0045000000;external control F16D0048000000)
disengaged by a contact of a part mounted on the clutch with a stationarily-mounted member
with clutching members movable only axially
with clutching members movable otherwise than only axially, e.g. rotatable keys
actuated by moving a non-rotating part axially
with clutching members movable only axially
with clutching members movable otherwise than only axially

title.ko: 축 방향으로만 이동 가능한 클러치부재(11/02, 11/08이 우선)
title.en: with clutching members movable only axially (F16D0011020000, F16D0011080000 take precedence)

title.ko: 축 방향뿐만이 아닌 방향으로도 이동 가능한 클러치부재를 가지는 것(11/02, 11/08이 우선)
title.en: with clutching members movable otherwise than only axially (F16D0011020000, F16D0011080000 take precedence)

title.ko: 마찰 클러치(동기(synchro) 장치 F16D 23/02; 자동 클러치 F16D 43/00-F16D 45/00; 외부 제어 F16D 48/00)
title.en: Friction clutches (arrangements for synchronisation F16D0023020000;automatic clutches F16D0043000000-F16D0045000000;external control F16D0048000000)
disengaged by the contact of a part mounted on the clutch with a stationarily-mounted member

title.ko: 연결되기 위한 축들 중 하나로부터 구동되는 힘에 의해 작동되거나 계합을 유지하는 수단을 가지는 것(자동 클러치 43/00)
title.en: with means for actuating or keeping engaged by a force derived at least partially from one of the shafts to be connected (automatic clutches F16D0043000000)

title.ko: 축 방향이외의 방향으로도 움직일 수 있는 클러치 부재를 갖는 것(13/08, 13/12이 우선)
title.en: with clutching members movable otherwise than only axially (F16D0013080000, F16D0013120000 take precedence)

title.ko: 밴드의 일단에 작용하는 추가적인 클러치의 유무에 관계없이 드럼 또는 그와 유사한 것을 1회 이상 둘러싸는 한편 연결된(linked) 부분으로 부터 조립될 수 있는 헬리컬 밴드 또는 그와 동등한 부재를 가지는 것(13/02가 우선)
title.en: with a helical band or equivalent member, which may be built-up from linked parts, with more than one turn embracing a drum or the like, with or without an additional clutch actuating the end of the band (F16D0013020000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 드럼, 휠-림(rim) 또는 이에 유사한 것에 작용하는 클러치부재를 갖는 것(13/02 ～ 13/08이 우선)
title.en: with clutching members co-operating with the periphery of a drum, a wheel-rim, or the like (F16D0013020000-F16D0013080000 take precedence)

title.ko: 드럼 또는 그와 유사한 것의 내주면과 협동하여 확장할 수 있는 밴드 또는 코일을 가지는 것(13/02이 우선)
title.en: with an expansible band or coil co-operating with the inner surface of a drum or the like (F16D0013020000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 드럼 또는 그와 유사한 것의 내주면과 협동하여 밖으로 향하여 움직일 수 있는 클러치 부재를 가지는 것(13/02, 13/06, 13/12이 우선)
title.en: with outwardly-movable clutching members co-operating with the inner surface of a drum or the like (F16D0013020000, F16D0013060000, F16D0013120000 take precedence)
shaped as radially-movable segments
shaped as linked or separately-pivoted segments
with clutching members co-operating with both the periphery and the inner surface of a drum or wheel-rim
with axially-movable clutching members
with conical friction surfaces
in which the or each axially-movable member is pressed exclusively against an axially-located member
with means for increasing the effective force between the actuating sleeve or equivalent member and the pressure member
in which the clutching pressure is produced by springs only
in which two or more axially-movable members are pressed from one side towards an axially-located member
with means for increasing the effective force between the actuating sleeve or equivalent member and the pressure member
in which the clutching pressure is produced by springs only
with flat clutching surfaces, e.g. discs
in which the or each axially-movable member is pressed exclusively against an axially-located member
with means for increasing the effective force between the actuating sleeve or equivalent member and the pressure member
in which the clutching pressure is produced by springs only
in which two axially-movable members, of which one is attached to the driving side and the other to the driven side, are pressed from one side towards an axially-located member
with means for increasing the effective force between the actuating sleeve or equivalent member and the pressure member
in which the clutching pressure is produced by springs only
Clutches with multiple lamellae
with means for increasing the effective force between the actuating sleeve or equivalent member and the pressure member
in which the clutching pressure is produced by springs only

title.ko: 세부
title.en: Details

title.ko: 클러치 요소(마찰 라이닝(lining) 또는 그 설치 F16D69/00)
title.en: Clutching elements (friction lining or attachment thereof F16D0069000000)

title.ko: 클러치 밴드, 클러치 슈, 클러치 드럼(브레이크 밴드, 브레이크 슈, 브레이크 드럼 F16D 65/00)
title.en: Clutch-bands; Clutch-shoes; Clutch-drums (brake-bands, brake-shoes, brake-drums F16D0065000000)

title.ko: 클러치판; 클러치 박판(Clutch-lamellae)(브레이크판, 브레이크 박판 65/12)
title.en: Clutch-plates; Clutch-lamellae (brake-plates, brake-lamellae F16D0065120000)
of conical shape
